trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: preserve prior submission versions for the teacher review loop by adding a D1 version-history table, submit-time snapshots, review-history output, and integration coverage.
scope: Add immutable submission version snapshots for student submit/resubmit actions and expose them through the scoped review-history endpoint without leaking Drive storage IDs.
changes: Added `migrations/0005_submission_versions.sql` with an immutable `submission_versions` table keyed by submission/version.
Added `writeSubmissionVersionSnapshot` to record submitted/resubmitted versions with evidence metadata only, excluding Drive storage identifiers.
Updated `/api/submissions/:id/submit` to write a version snapshot after successful submit/resubmit.
Updated `/api/reviews/:submissionId/history` to return formatted version snapshots alongside review decisions and status history.
Extended the review-loop integration test to prove version 1 and version 2 remain visible after revision, resubmission, and approval.
blockers: Remote D1 still needs a non-interactive `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` before `0005_submission_versions.sql` can be applied/verified remotely.
known_limits: Version snapshots currently preserve submit-time status and evidence metadata, not guided proposal section-body content; guided section drafts remain a follow-on for MVP-012.
Review-history UI still needs to render the returned `versions` array.
next_actions: Apply D1 migrations remotely once Wrangler has `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN`, then re-run the alpha seed/workflow smoke against preview or production.
Wire the app review-history UI to show submission version snapshots and add comment history into the same surface.
